LanguageData.USAC_Product_ACSW.label: Advanced support weapon
LanguageData.USAC_Product_ACSW.description: M307 "Terminator" light automatic grenade launcher. It combines a high rate of fire with portability, enabling sustained fragmentation bombardment against enemy infantry formations and serving as a core area-denial weapon on the battlefield.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_AssaultHelmet.label: Assault helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Product_AssaultHelmet.description: A light tactical helmet with a composite plasteel shell. In addition to integrated ear protection, it can be fitted with optional attachments such as flashlights as needed.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_AssaultRifle.label: Advanced Auto Rifle
LanguageData.USAC_Product_AssaultRifle.description: An advanced automatic rifle. Standard issue for USAC infantry, achieving a perfect "corporate balance" between accuracy, firepower, and weight.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Battery.label: Disposable Battery
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Battery.description: A round single-use battery that can rapidly fully charge mechanized units. To prevent users from illegally modifying and reusing charging hardware, it is designed to short-circuit and self-destruct after discharge.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Bond.label: Credit bonds
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Bond.description: A special high-toughness fiber paper voucher issued by USAC dealers during trade with ground factions. Printed with special ink, it includes anti-counterfeit markings and registered ownership data. Remaining value from purchases and equipment sales can be converted into this fixed-purchasing-power certificate for future transactions. Because it is registered, only the listed owner can use it, making this highly durable paper practically useless to other rimworld factions.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Bushmaster.label: Bushmaster III
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Bushmaster.description: A large-caliber chain cannon. Core armament for USAC air platforms and heavy units, capable of penetrating even light ship armor.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Cobalt.label: M7 "Cobalt"
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Cobalt.description: A medium quadruped mech platform independently developed by USAC, designed to support infantry advances with heavy firepower and conduct point-clearance operations. Its hull uses a patented high-temperature-resistant nanocoating, allowing steady movement even in severe fire conditions. Its calm, unstoppable mechanical presence has earned it the nickname "Hellhound."
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Cobra.label: Cobra Assault Cannon
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Cobra.description: The Cobra autocannon. Commonly mounted on mech infantry or heavy exoskeletons, delivering devastating sustained area fire.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_ExoSkeleton.label: Hardiman unit
LanguageData.USAC_Product_ExoSkeleton.description: An exoskeleton unit that can mount plasteel inserts for defense, with protection effectiveness decreasing as insert durability drops. This motor-driven powered frame allows personnel to lift and operate heavy weapon systems.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Gonk.label: XM3 "Gonk"
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Gonk.description: An anti-infantry support platform for security operations in occupied urban zones. It is designed for urban combat against armored ambushers equipped with exoskeletons and heavy anti-tank weapons. With high survivability, it also mounts an experimental rapid-response laser weapon system.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_HeavyHelmet.label: Heavy helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Product_HeavyHelmet.description: A full-coverage composite plasteel protective helmet with enhanced frontal fragment protection, widely used by machine gunners and heavy infantry operating in high-intensity frontline engagements.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_LMG.label: Advanced LMG
LanguageData.USAC_Product_LMG.description: An advanced light machine gun. Its air-cooled barrel and belt feed provide sustained suppressive fire, making it a prime choice for area denial.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Marksman.label: Marksman Rifle
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Marksman.description: An advanced designated marksman rifle. Designed for rapid follow-up fire at long range, it uses full-power ammunition and can effectively penetrate standard ballistic protection.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_MeleeHelmet.label: Gladiator helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Product_MeleeHelmet.description: A tactical helmet for indoor operations equipped with ballistic goggles that protect the eyes from fragments and burns. Although reflective angles may slightly hinder aiming, it offers excellent close-quarters visual protection.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_NeuroBooster.label: Neuro-Booster
LanguageData.USAC_Product_NeuroBooster.description: A neural enhancement drug (Neuro Augment Serum). Embedded nanomachines improve neural activity and rational cognition, making it a common performance enhancer for USAC technical workers and military personnel. As nanomachines gradually deactivate over time, users may experience agitation and emotional instability, and rare susceptible cases suggest low activity can trigger unexplained allergic shock. After first use, regular continued dosing is required to maintain nanomachine activity.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_NightVisionHelmet.label: Night vision helmet
LanguageData.USAC_Product_NightVisionHelmet.descripti: A light tactical helmet with a quad-eye night vision array, significantly improving nighttime firing capability and accuracy. While its front-heavy balance slightly reduces close-combat response speed, it provides overwhelming advantages in darkness.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Omaha.label: M110 "Omaha"
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Omaha.description: An ultra-heavy breaching mech designed for mine clearing and ambush sweeping along transport routes. It features a massive mine plow and a pair of rocket-propelled line charges for long-range obstacle clearance. Built for demolishing structures and fortifications, it also carries sufficient self-defense firepower to neutralize nearby illegal armed groups and guerrilla armored vehicles.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_OSW.label: Objective sniper weapon
LanguageData.USAC_Product_OSW.description: M109 "Payload" sniper grenade launcher. A precision-strike weapon designed for exoskeleton infantry, capable of firing shaped-charge grenades to accurately destroy target surface armor and external sensors.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Paraman.label: M939 "Paraman"
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Paraman.description: A large humanoid mech designed as a multifunctional unmanned wingman for USAC mechanized airborne formations. As all-domain autonomous warfare has advanced, this model's extremely low attrition rate and strong survivability have proven exceptional in multiple sector-scale deep-space orbital insertion operations, making it a cornerstone of modern high-intensity orbital assault warfare.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Ration.label: B-Ration
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Ration.description: Grade-B field ration pack. Extremely long shelf life and integrated sustained analgesic compounds significantly improve soldier endurance in harsh environments.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_RepairKit.label: Repair Tool
LanguageData.USAC_Product_RepairKit.description: A square nano-storage container that releases nanomachines to automatically analyze target structures and repair damaged sections. To prevent unsafe user modifications, this tool is designed for single use.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Rocky.label: M88 "Rocky"
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Rocky.description: A second-generation humanoid mech independently developed by USAC. Built on an advanced USAC compute core and deep bionic design, it delivers overwhelming intelligence and stealth advantages in precision tactical operations. With very high compatibility and strong cost-effectiveness, it has become the preferred model among security forces and private armed groups across the sector.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_SABR.label: M29 SABR
LanguageData.USAC_Product_SABR.description: A modular integrated rifle system. It combines a high-precision rifle with a 20mm grenade launcher, enabling engagement of threats at multiple ranges and behind cover.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Subscription.label: Mechlink Serum
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Subscription.description: A neural enhancement drug (Neuro Augment Serum). Its neural nanomachines form a brain-base interface and establish psionic communication with the USAC orbital satellite network. It provides mech control and bandwidth VPN proxy services through a quarterly subscription model. Additional doses can extend service duration during active coverage, but if the user's brain activity ceases, mech-control services terminate immediately and all remaining subscription time is cleared.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Torchwood.label: Torchwood RR
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Torchwood.description: The Torchwood recoilless rifle. With exceptional armor penetration and structural destruction capability, it is the ultimate tool for breaching and anti-armor operations.
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Viper.label: Viper DMR
LanguageData.USAC_Product_Viper.description: The Viper long-range anti-materiel weapon. It uses 35mm autocannon ammunition and is purpose-built for precise long-range destruction of enemy armor and electronic equipment.
